caption: A male news presenter with glasses, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and maroon tie, speaks toward the camera in a television studio. He is positioned in front of a blue background featuring a world map and a circular graphic containing the text "PLUS POLITICS". A red vertical banner on the left side of the screen displays a logo and the word "plustv". A news ticker at the bottom of the screen reads "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Additional on-screen text provides viewing information, including "FOLLOW US" with social media icons and "PLUSTVAFRICA", "WATCH ON" with "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308", "WATCH ONLINE" with "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV", and "SUBSCRIBE" with "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA". Across the sequence, the presenter remains in the same position, though his facial expression and mouth movements change as he speaks.
